---
title: "Quantum Notes"
subtitle: "Pedagogical write-ups on quantum computing"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
